top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on proposal to require certain payment stablecoin issuers to maintain an effective customer identification program
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on proposal to require certain payment stablecoin issuers to maintain an effective customer identification program
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Police raid malware network tied to Russia's Evil Corp hacker group
top_signals.summary: An international operation targeted the SocGholish botnet, which has been linked to the Russia-based cybercrime group Evil Corp.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: St Barbara’s 100,000 oz Nova Scotia gold hub gets green light
top_signals.summary: Redesigned project enters public consultation phase with plans for 11 years of gold production and major economic benefits.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
